title: .Hack//The Movie
original_title: ドットハック セカイの向こうに
overview: In 2024, the computer network prevails throughout the daily life. Arishiro Sora is a 14 year old girl. One day, she is invited to an online game "The World". After an accident in the game, the real world begins to deform.
